data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but the evidence does not provide any details on how the system handles such changes. The linked use case describes the waitlist process but does not address the specific behavior when a group size is altered post-booking. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement to confirm the expected behavior in this scenario.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior when group size changes after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify group size change handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system correctly processes changes to the group size after a booking is made.
